# Guelph Exterminator — Pest Control Leads, Guelph, Ontario

> Connects Guelph, Ontario homeowners and businesses needing pest control with a single vetted, exclusive local licensed exterminator. Part of the WeProvideLeads network of local-service lead generation sites serving Guelph, Ontario, Canada.

This site is a lead-generation and referral service, not a pest control company itself. Requests submitted through the contact form are matched with one qualified, exclusive exterminator serving the area. Licensed under the Ontario Pesticides Act; pet-safe and family-safe treatment options available.

## Services
- Mouse & Rodent Control
- Ant Control
- Wasp & Hornet Removal
- Bed Bug Treatment
- Spider & Other Insects
- Commercial Pest Control

## Service area
Guelph, Fergus, Elora, Rockwood, Erin, Acton, Puslinch, Cambridge, Wellington County
